jobs.title: Cleaner
jobs.description: We are looking for a reliable and hardworking cleaner to maintain cleanliness in residential and commercial spaces across Buea. Duties include sweeping, mopping, dusting, and general sanitation.
jobs.companyAbout: CleanHome Services provides affordable cleaning solutions to homes and businesses in Buea since 2020.

jobs.title: Housekeeper
jobs.description: Elite Homes is hiring a dedicated housekeeper for a private residence in Buea. Responsibilities include cleaning, laundry, cooking light meals, and general household management.
jobs.companyAbout: Elite Homes Buea manages premium residential properties and provides domestic staffing services.

jobs.title: Masseur / Spa Therapist
jobs.description: Serenity Spa is looking for a skilled masseur/spa therapist to provide relaxing and therapeutic massage services to our clients. Must be professional, calm, and client-focused.
requirements: Massage therapy certification or equivalent experience
jobs.companyAbout: Serenity Spa Buea is the leading wellness center in the SW Region offering world-class relaxation and beauty services.

jobs.title: Graphic Designer
jobs.description: CreativeHub is seeking a talented graphic designer to create visual content for local businesses. Work includes social media graphics, flyers, logos, and branding materials.
requirements: Proficiency in Canva, Photoshop, or Illustrator
jobs.companyAbout: CreativeHub Buea is a digital creative agency helping local businesses build strong visual brands.

jobs.title: Full Stack Developer
jobs.description: TechBridge Buea is hiring a full stack developer to build and maintain web applications for local businesses. You will work with HTML, CSS, JavaScript, Node.js, and databases.
requirements: Experience with Node.js or similar backend
jobs.companyAbout: TechBridge Buea provides affordable tech solutions to local businesses. Founded in 2022, we have helped over 40 businesses go digital.
